Ah, Elly! Sorry, I was so hungry... I already ate dinner first?

\SE[4]Ugh, it's filthy... This place... is the worst environment, Onii-chan...!

\SE[17]Ugh, it's so cramped...! And it's dusty too, there's no way we can rest in a place
like this...

\SE[2]Alright! Then Elly, you clean this place up for us. I don't wanna sleep in a filthy
place like this either!

\SE[17]I was going to do that even without you telling me...! Sigh, the things I have to

'Kay, then we'll go in the meantime... Let's check out what the Village Chief

\SE[3]But seriously, this place... looks like it's been left alone for quite a while, but
at least there's a bed prepared, so that's a relief... If there had been nothing, we
might have had to go get sleeping bags.

That's right... It seems the lord sent adventurers, so maybe they left it behind
then?

\SE[19]Ah... so that's why there's such an old-man-like lingering scent~...! Eww... that's
gross...! I'll have to wash all the bedding.........

...Elly is a neat freak, so living here must be tough for her. For her sake, we need
to finish the job quickly...

\SE[19]Hah...I still have to spend time with that idiot in a place like this... Onii-chan,
is your work still not done?
Hmm, I wonder... At this point, I still can't really say...
\SE[23]I see... Well, it can't be helped... Ugh, I guess it won't go that smoothly...
...Huh? Elly's not here...? It looks like she prepared dinner, though......

Only my dinner is left on the table... Did they both eat already? Ugh... Yesterday,
Elly waited for me......
Well, I guess it can't be helped... Let's eat......

I ate my lonely, slightly cooled dinner alone... Well, Elly's cooking was still
delicious as always. But still, where did Elly go......?
...Thanks for the meal. Elly didn't come back... And where's Dario, too...?
...Maybe I should go look for them......

\SE[default]Ah! Welcome back, onii-chan. I just finished preparing dinner. Come on, let's eat
together... Huh? Wait, where is he? \SE[3]
Ah, yeah... I think he'll probably be here soon......
\SE[8]Wooooah! I smell food!! Hey, I'm starving! Hurry up and feed me!
\SE[18]\SM[stamp]You...! Say 'itadakimasu' before you eat! Your manners are terrible! Honestly!
Haha... Well then, shall we eat together too?

\SE[2]Alright, itadakima―su! Mmm, gulp...... mmm, ...... Man, this is good... I feel alive
again......!

Yeah, it's delicious...! To be able to make a meal like this in a place without
proper facilities... You really are amazing, Elly.
\SE[22]\SM[sexhara1]Eh, ehe... N-no way... you're exaggerating...! It's nothing that special...!

No, you are amazing! Once before, Mana tried to cook for us when we were camping. She
could start a fire with magic right away...

But in the end, it seemed like she didn't have enough tools or preparation, and she
couldn't make what she wanted and got really down about it...... If you had been
there then, Elly, it wouldn't have turned out like that...

\SE[1]...Fufu. That's right. With my and Mana-chan's magic, we could probably make any
dish.
Yeah, that's right... If Elly were with us, I'm sure......
\SE[15]Huh? That was the last of it, though?

\SE[4]No, seriously... You're way too greedy. Maybe you should take this chance to go on a

\SE[2]Eh!? Really, \n[1]? You're the best, \n[1]! Hehe! I'm glad we're best friends!

The three childhood friends shared a lively dinner together. I was a bit tired from
work... but Elly's cooking restored my energy! Let's do our best again starting
tomorrow...!
......Morning? I can't tell the time since I can't see the sun...
Dario isn't here... Did he go ahead already? Ugh... I need to get to work soon too...
\SE[default]Good night, onii-chan... Do your best tomorrow too........

\SE[2]Good morning, Onii-chan... You're way too late getting up... I was just about to come

Haha... Good morning, Elly. The futon was just so comfortable, I couldn't help it...

\SE[19]Dario already started work, leaving you behind, sleepyhead. That idiot's all fired up

Onii-chan!\SM[double]

W-well, it's not like we're competing or anything... If Dario finishes his work
quickly, we can get back to the village sooner too.
\SE[7]...E-even so! I just don't like the idea of you losing to someone like Dario...!

O-oh, really...? Well, if you put it that way, I feel motivated to try harder too.
Alright, I'm off to work! Elly!

\SE[17]Hmm... I might not have enough ingredients. I should have factored in that glutton's

\SE[3]Good morning, Onii-chan... You finally woke up. Aren't you late every morning?
Good morning... Huh, I thought I managed to get up early today for sure...
Ah, maybe... It's not that I woke up early, but that Dario overslept today...

\SE[17]...Hmph, looks like it! Well, don't worry about that bastard! He probably just felt

\SE[19]Anyway, since it's come to this, you're the only one I can rely on, so let's hurry

Hmm, well... okay. Tell Dario I went on ahead.
\SE[23]Hah... That Dario... What in the world is he doing........
Dario's already asleep... Was he that tired...?

I should follow Dario's example and go to bed early too... Tomorrow looks like it'll
be tough, so I need to rest my body.

Huh, Dario...are you asleep? When did you get back... You could've at least said
something...
I wanted to ask where Elly is... But he's probably tired, so I'll leave him be.

I should follow his example and get to sleep quickly too... I've got work starting
early tomorrow morning.

He's sleeping quietly, not even snoring... He must have been really tired, Dario...
I'll let him rest...
\SE[3]Ah, onii-chan... Good work. Dario already finished eating.
Huh, already? I just left Dario a moment ago.

\SE[17]Yeah... He wolfed it down in a flash and went straight to his room. That guy was

Huh? Well... I don't think it's like that... We just talked a bit after finishing

\SE[1]...Well, whatever. Let's just leave that idiot alone... He'll be in a better mood
after he sleeps, I'm sure! C'mon! Let's eat together, I've been waiting!
